description: In `filterServer()`, the `shiny::updateSelectizeInput()` call is applied to the `keyword` input, which was created as a `shiny::textInput()`. `updateSelectizeInput` only works with `selectizeInput` widgets; using it on a `textInput` silently fails to update the widget. Replace the call with `shiny::updateTextInput()` so the keyword input is correctly populated with filter choices.
